page.startDescription: Set up a construction project for this home with 22 standard phases and a starter task checklist you can customize.
page.deleteProjectConfirm: Delete this build project and all its phases, tasks, and attachments? This cannot be undone.

planning.name: Planning
planning.description: Initial project setup: permits, design, financing, and contractor selection before ground is broken.

sitePreparation.name: Site Preparation
sitePreparation.description: Clearing, access, and utility groundwork before excavation begins.

foundation.name: Foundation
foundation.description: Excavation, footings, and slab or crawlspace construction.

framing.name: Framing
framing.description: Structural skeleton: floors, walls, and roof framing.

windowsExteriorDoors.name: Windows & Exterior Doors
windowsExteriorDoors.description: Installing the building envelope's window and door openings.

exteriorEnvelope.name: Exterior Envelope
exteriorEnvelope.description: Weather barrier, insulation, and exterior cladding.

plumbingRoughIn.name: Plumbing Rough-In
plumbingRoughIn.description: Water supply, drain, and vent piping installed before walls are closed.

electricalRoughIn.name: Electrical Rough-In
electricalRoughIn.description: Wiring, boxes, and panel groundwork before walls are closed.

hvacRoughIn.name: HVAC Rough-In
hvacRoughIn.description: Ductwork, refrigerant lines, or hydronic piping before walls are closed.

insulation.name: Insulation
insulation.description: Thermal and acoustic insulation before drywall closes the walls.

drywall.name: Drywall
drywall.description: Wall and ceiling closure and finishing.

interiorFinishes.name: Interior Finishes
interiorFinishes.description: Trim, doors, and millwork throughout the interior.

flooring.name: Flooring
flooring.description: Final floor coverings throughout the house.

kitchen.name: Kitchen
kitchen.description: Cabinetry, countertops, and kitchen appliance installation.

bathrooms.name: Bathrooms
bathrooms.description: Fixtures and finishes for each bathroom.

painting.name: Painting
painting.description: Interior and exterior paint and finish coats.

exteriorWorks.name: Exterior Works
exteriorWorks.description: Driveways, walkways, decks, and other hardscape.

landscaping.name: Landscaping
landscaping.description: Grading, planting, and final grounds finishing.

finalInspections.name: Final Inspections
finalInspections.description: Regulatory and safety inspections before occupancy.

punchList.name: Punch List
punchList.description: Identifying and resolving remaining defects before handover.

handover.name: Handover
handover.description: Final walkthrough, documentation, and keys transfer.

siteSurvey.title: Site Survey
siteSurvey.description:
Commission a topographic survey
Confirm property boundaries
Identify soil conditions
Locate existing utilities

architecturalPlans.title: Architectural Plans
architecturalPlans.description:
Brief the architect on requirements
Review preliminary sketches
Approve final floor plans
Approve elevations and sections

buildingPermits.title: Building Permits
buildingPermits.description:
Submit permit application
Respond to any requests for information
Obtain approved permit
Post permit on site

budgetFinancingApproval.title: Budget & Financing Approval
budgetFinancingApproval.description:
Finalize construction budget
Secure financing or construction loan
Set contingency reserve
Approve payment schedule

contractorSelection.title: Contractor Selection
contractorSelection.description:
Request bids from qualified contractors
Compare quotes and references
Sign construction contract
Schedule project kickoff

siteClearing.title: Site Clearing
siteClearing.description:
Remove vegetation and debris
Fell and clear designated trees
Grade access route for equipment
Fence off the site

temporaryUtilities.title: Temporary Utilities
temporaryUtilities.description:
Install temporary power connection
Install temporary water supply
Set up site office/storage container
Install site sanitation

surveyStaking.title: Survey & Staking
surveyStaking.description:
Stake out building corners
Mark excavation limits
Verify setbacks against permit
Protect survey markers

excavation.title: Excavation
excavation.description:
Excavate to design depth
Verify excavation dimensions
Inspect soil bearing capacity
Install temporary shoring if required

formsReinforcement.title: Forms & Reinforcement
formsReinforcement.description:
Set formwork to plan dimensions
Install reinforcement steel
Position utility penetrations and sleeves
Verify drainage and waterproofing membrane

foundationPour.title: Foundation Pour
foundationPour.description:
Verify excavation dimensions
Install reinforcement
Verify drainage
Position utility penetrations
Pour concrete
Finish surface
Allow curing
Prepare for inspection

floorFraming.title: Floor Framing
floorFraming.description:
Install sill plates and anchor bolts
Install floor joists
Install subfloor sheathing
Verify level and square

wallFraming.title: Wall Framing
wallFraming.description:
Erect exterior wall panels
Erect interior partition walls
Install headers over openings
Brace and plumb walls

roofFraming.title: Roof Framing
roofFraming.description:
Set ridge beam and rafters or trusses
Install roof sheathing
Verify structural connections
Prepare for inspection

roofUnderlayment.title: Roof Underlayment
roofUnderlayment.description:
Install roofing felt or synthetic underlayment
Install flashing at valleys and penetrations
Install drip edge

roofCovering.title: Roof Covering
roofCovering.description:
Install roofing material (tiles, shingles, or metal)
Install ridge caps
Install gutters and downspouts
Inspect for leaks after installation

roofVentilation.title: Roof Ventilation
roofVentilation.description:
Install ridge and soffit vents
Verify airflow path
Seal vent penetrations

windowInstallation.title: Window Installation
windowInstallation.description:
Verify rough opening dimensions
Set and level windows
Install flashing and seal
Adjust for smooth operation

exteriorDoorInstallation.title: Exterior Door Installation
exteriorDoorInstallation.description:
Verify rough opening dimensions
Set and level door frames
Install flashing and weatherstripping
Test lock and hardware operation

exteriorTrimCaulking.title: Exterior Trim & Caulking
exteriorTrimCaulking.description:
Install exterior window and door trim
Caulk all exterior joints
Inspect weatherproofing

weatherResistiveBarrier.title: Weather-Resistive Barrier
weatherResistiveBarrier.description:
Install house wrap or weather barrier
Tape and seal all seams
Install flashing around penetrations

exteriorCladding.title: Exterior Cladding
exteriorCladding.description:
Install cladding material (siding, brick, or render)
Install trim and corner details
Caulk and seal joints
Inspect for consistent alignment

exteriorWaterproofingInspection.title: Exterior Waterproofing Inspection
exteriorWaterproofingInspection.description:
Inspect flashing details
Inspect cladding fastening
Confirm weep holes and drainage paths are clear

plumbingLayout.title: Plumbing Layout
plumbingLayout.description:
Mark fixture locations
Coordinate with framing for pipe runs
Verify vent stack routing

waterHeaterRoughIn.title: Water Heater Rough-In
waterHeaterRoughIn.description:
Position water heater
Rough-in supply and vent connections
Verify code clearances

plumbingRoughInInstallation.title: Plumbing Rough-In Installation
plumbingRoughInInstallation.description:
Install supply lines
Install drain-waste-vent piping
Pressure-test supply lines
Cap open lines for inspection

electricalLayout.title: Electrical Layout
electricalLayout.description:
Mark outlet, switch, and fixture locations
Confirm circuit plan against electrical drawings
Coordinate with other rough-in trades

serviceEntranceConnection.title: Service Entrance Connection
serviceEntranceConnection.description:
Coordinate utility service connection
Install meter base
Schedule utility hookup

electricalRoughInInstallation.title: Electrical Rough-In Installation
electricalRoughInInstallation.description:
Install electrical panel
Run wiring to boxes
Install boxes for outlets, switches, and fixtures
Label circuits

hvacLayout.title: HVAC Layout
hvacLayout.description:
Confirm equipment locations
Plan duct or pipe routing
Coordinate penetrations with framing

equipmentInstallation.title: HVAC Equipment Installation
equipmentInstallation.description:
Set furnace, heat pump, or boiler unit
Connect refrigerant or hydronic lines
Verify condensate drainage

hvacRoughInInstallation.title: HVAC Rough-In Installation
hvacRoughInInstallation.description:
Install ductwork or piping
Install equipment mounting points
Pressure-test lines where applicable
Seal duct joints

insulationInstallation.title: Insulation Installation
insulationInstallation.description:
Install wall cavity insulation
Install attic/roof insulation
Seal air gaps and penetrations
Verify vapor barrier placement

insulationInspection.title: Insulation Inspection
insulationInspection.description:
Verify R-value compliance
Check for gaps and compression
Sign off before drywall close-in

drywallHanging.title: Drywall Hanging
drywallHanging.description:
Hang drywall sheets on walls and ceilings
Fasten per manufacturer spacing
Cut openings for outlets and fixtures

drywallFinishing.title: Drywall Taping & Finishing
drywallFinishing.description:
Tape and mud joints
Sand smooth
Apply texture if specified
Inspect for imperfections

interiorDoorInstallation.title: Interior Door Installation
interiorDoorInstallation.description:
Hang interior doors
Install door hardware
Adjust for smooth swing and latch

trimMillwork.title: Trim & Millwork
trimMillwork.description:
Install baseboards
Install door and window casings
Install crown molding where specified
Caulk and fill nail holes

floorPreparation.title: Floor Preparation
floorPreparation.description:
Clean and level subfloor
Repair any subfloor defects
Confirm moisture levels are acceptable

flooringInstallation.title: Flooring Installation
flooringInstallation.description:
Install flooring material per room
Install transition strips
Install baseboards where affected
Inspect for gaps or defects

kitchenCabinetInstallation.title: Kitchen Cabinet Installation
kitchenCabinetInstallation.description:
Install upper and lower cabinets
Verify level and alignment
Install cabinet hardware

countertopInstallation.title: Countertop Installation
countertopInstallation.description:
Template countertop dimensions
Install countertops
Seal seams and edges

kitchenApplianceInstallation.title: Kitchen Appliance Installation
kitchenApplianceInstallation.description:
Install and connect appliances
Verify water and gas connections
Test appliance operation

bathroomFixtureInstallation.title: Bathroom Fixture Installation
bathroomFixtureInstallation.description:
Install toilets, sinks, and tubs/showers
Connect water supply and drain lines
Test for leaks

bathroomVentilation.title: Bathroom Ventilation
bathroomVentilation.description:
Install exhaust fan
Verify duct routing to exterior
Test fan operation

bathroomWaterproofingTiling.title: Bathroom Waterproofing & Tiling
bathroomWaterproofingTiling.description:
Apply waterproof membrane in wet areas
Install wall and floor tile
Grout and seal tile joints

surfacePreparation.title: Surface Preparation
surfacePreparation.description:
Fill and sand imperfections
Mask trim and fixtures
Apply primer coat

paintApplication.title: Paint Application
paintApplication.description:
Apply interior wall and ceiling paint
Apply exterior paint or stain
Apply second coat where needed
Inspect coverage and finish

hardscaping.title: Hardscaping
hardscaping.description:
Install driveway and walkways
Install exterior steps and decks
Install exterior lighting fixtures

fencingBoundaryWalls.title: Fencing & Boundary Walls
fencingBoundaryWalls.description:
Install fencing per site plan
Install boundary or retaining walls if specified
Inspect for stability

finalGrading.title: Final Grading
finalGrading.description:
Grade soil away from foundation
Remove construction debris
Prepare soil for planting

plantingSeeding.title: Planting & Seeding
plantingSeeding.description:
Plant trees and shrubs per landscape plan
Seed or lay turf
Install irrigation if specified

finalBuildingInspection.title: Final Building Inspection
finalBuildingInspection.description:
Schedule final building inspection
Address any inspector findings
Obtain certificate of occupancy

safetySystemsCheck.title: Safety Systems Check
safetySystemsCheck.description:
Test smoke and carbon monoxide detectors
Test ground-fault outlets
Verify egress window operation

punchListWalkthrough.title: Punch List Walkthrough
punchListWalkthrough.description:
Walk through with contractor
Document outstanding defects and items
Prioritize items by urgency

punchListResolution.title: Punch List Resolution
punchListResolution.description:
Complete outstanding repair items
Re-inspect completed items
Obtain sign-off on all items

finalWalkthrough.title: Final Walkthrough
finalWalkthrough.description:
Walk through the finished home with the owner
Demonstrate systems and equipment operation
Confirm all punch list items are resolved

documentsKeysHandover.title: Documents & Keys Handover
documentsKeysHandover.description:
Assemble warranty documents and manuals
Assemble as-built drawings
Transfer keys and access codes
Collect final sign-off from owner

newHomeModal.title: New home
newHomeModal.existingDesc: A property you already own or live in — full module set.
newHomeModal.projectDesc: Scouting locations, searching for land, or managing a build.
newHomeModal.demoDesc: Pre-filled with sample data across every module — great for exploring the app.

list.title: Chore List
list.emptyState: No chore assignments yet. Go to Management to create chores and assign them to rooms.

page.emptyCharts: No chore assignments yet — click ＋ Add chore to get started.
page.emptyNoChores: No chores yet — click ＋ Add chore to get started.
page.emptyNoneNeedAttention: No chores need attention right now.

newModal.title: New Chore
newModal.scheduleFromDueTitle: Next due = planned date + period (not completion date + period)

page.emptyCharts: No works yet — click ＋ Add work to get started.
page.title: Title
page.emptyNoWorks: No works yet — click ＋ Add work to get started.

page.emptyCharts: No items yet — click ＋ Add item to get started.
page.emptyNoItems: No items yet — click ＋ Add item to get started.

page.emptyCharts: No consumables yet — click ＋ Add consumable to get started.
page.emptyNoConsumables: No consumables yet — click ＋ Add consumable to get started.

page.emptyState: No locations yet — add candidates below to start comparing.

page.emptyCharts: No properties yet — click ＋ Add property to get started.
page.emptyNoProperties: No properties yet — click ＋ Add property to get started.

page.emptyCharts: No entries yet — click ＋ Add entry to get started.
page.emptyNoEntries: No entries yet — click ＋ Add entry to get started.

categoryModal.title: {emoji} {name} — per year
categoryModal.noEntries: No entries for this category yet.

auth.contactAdmin: Contact your admin to create an account
auth.oidcAccountConflict: An account with this username already exists. Contact your administrator to link accounts.

general.name: Name
general.modulesDesc: Choose which modules are visible in the nav for this home.
general.deleteHomeSuffix: ? This permanently removes all data for this home and cannot be undone.
general.moduleHideWarning: This hides {label} but does not delete your data.

security.tokensDesc: Tokens for automation, MCP, and API access. A token's scope cannot exceed your own role.
security.name: Name
security.ssoDesc: Let users sign in via an external OIDC provider (Keycloak, Authentik, Google Workspace, etc.) alongside local username/password login.
security.copyTokenNow: Copy this token now. It will not be shown again.
security.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters

integrations.mcpDesc: Lets an MCP client (Claude Desktop, claude.ai, Claude Code, or Home Assistant's Assist) query and act on this home's data. Create an API token above with the access level you want the assistant to have, then use it as the Bearer token when connecting.
integrations.donetickDesc: Imports chores from your Donetick instance into this home. Paste an API token from Donetick and click Import.

backup.downloadDesc: Download a zip archive of all your data.
backup.restoreDesc: Replace all current data from a previously downloaded backup.
backup.restoreComplete: Restore complete. Reload the page to see updated data.
backup.restoreWarning: This will replace all current data with the contents of the backup. This cannot be undone.

notifications.desc: Surface chores due soon, low-stock consumables, and expiring warranties in one place, with an optional daily summary pushed to Home Assistant.
notifications.choresThreshold: Chores "due soon" threshold (fraction of period remaining)
notifications.haDigest: Send a daily digest via Home Assistant

mediaGallery.emptyState: No media yet. Drop files here or use the button below.

trash.title: Trash
trash.confirmEmptyBody: Permanently delete all {n, plural, one {# page} other {# pages}} in Trash? This cannot be undone.

page.selectOrCreate: Select a page or create one
page.startWritingPlaceholder: Start writing in Markdown… (type /page to create a linked child page)
page.andSubPages: and {n, plural, one {# sub-page} other {# sub-pages}}
page.restoreThemNote: You can restore them from Trash afterward.
page.restoreItNote: You can restore it from Trash afterward.

app.noHomes: Create your first home to get started.

allFloor.title: House-wide
allFloor.sub: Drag chores here to assign to the whole house

placeholder.budgetDescription: Plan and track your acquisition or build budget.
placeholder.visitsDescription: Schedule and log site visits and viewings.
placeholder.contactsDescription: Manage agents, notaries, builders, and other contacts.
placeholder.checklistDescription: Track tasks and due diligence items for your project.
